text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a magical garden where flowers bloomed year-round and the air was filled with the sweetest fragrance. At the heart of this enchanting garden lived a wise old cat named Whiskers. Whiskers had soft, silver fur that shimmered like moonlight and eyes as deep and warm as the night sky.

Every evening, when the sun dipped below the horizon and painted the sky in hues of orange and pink, Whiskers would gather her little friends—a curious kitten named Paws, a mischievous raccoon named Rufus, and a kind-hearted squirrel named Nutty—to share stories under the glow of the full moon.

On one particularly starry night, Paws, who was always eager to explore, asked Whiskers, "What is the most magical thing you've seen in our garden?" Whiskers, with a gentle smile, replied, "The most magical sight I have ever seen is when the
